title: M2 Exchange - Rekt
relevance_summary: Access control breach leading to multi-chain asset theft

prevention.rule: Block any tx that transfers funds to external accounts after accessing internal funds without proper authorization.

red_flags: Unusual fund transfers to external accounts shortly after accessing internal funds
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that transfers funds to external accounts after accessing internal funds without proper authorization.
summary: M2 Exchange suffered a multi-chain access control breach where attackers transferred millions of dollars worth of assets to external accounts. A guard could have detected and blocked such transactions by monitoring for unauthorized fund transfers following access to internal funds.
